case_title: ANDREA PALASH et al VS. VALERIE LEE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANDREA PALASH ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
